mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.cover, c.articles_count AS articlesCount, c.subscription_count AS subscriptionCount, c.views, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.user_id AS authorId, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar FROM tb_column c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.is_deleted = FALSE
AND c.user_id = #{dto.userId}
AND c.status = 1
AND c.status = 1
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY c.articles_count DESC
ORDER BY c.views DESC
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.views, a.likes, a.comments, a.created_at AS createdAt FROM tb_column_article ca LEFT JOIN tb_article a ON ca.article_id = a.id WHERE ca.column_id = #{columnId} AND a.is_deleted = FALSE AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt, a.status, a.review, a.views, a.likes, a.comments FROM tb_article a WHERE a.author_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1 AND a.is_deleted = FALSE AND a.id NOT IN ( SELECT article_id FROM tb_column_article WHERE column_id = #{columnId} ) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT c.id AS columnId, c.title AS columnTitle, c.cover AS columnCover, u.nickname AS authorName, c.articles_count AS articlesCount, s.created_at AS subscribedAt FROM tb_column_subscription s LEFT JOIN tb_column c ON s.column_id = c.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = FALSE AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, s.created_at AS subscribedAt FROM tb_column_subscription s LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.column_id = #{columnId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.cover, c.articles_count AS articlesCount, c.subscription_count AS subscriptionCount, c.views, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.user_id AS authorId, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar FROM tb_column c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.is_deleted = FALSE AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.subscription_count DESC, c.views DESC LIMIT #{limit}
